title: Non-record: ConsensusWindow Bypass (FAT-Golf)
author: TheDryhtscipe

data.description: Replaces SmearGate with a depthwise causal convolution embedding path using a 16-token receptive field.
Adds a gated parallel depthwise causal convolution bypass path alongside attention in the deepest layers, blending attention and bypass outputs.

novel_contributions: Depthwise causal convolution bypass path derived from ORC FAT-AR architecture
ConsensusWindowEmbed replacing SmearGate at the embedding level
Gated ConsensusBlockBypass on the deepest 4 layers with 80/20 attention/bypass initialization
Improved robustness to EMA averaging and int6 quantization when the two architectural changes are combined
